name: BSEL Infrastructure Realty Limited
summary: BSEL Infrastructure Realty Limited develops, operates, and maintains real estate properties and related activities in India and the United Arab Emirates. The company was formerly known as BSEL Information System Limited and changed its name to BSEL Infrastructure Realty Limited in August 2003. BSEL Infrastructure Realty Limited was founded in 1995 and is based in Navi Mumbai, India.
